result.markdown: --- title: "ui" search: true --- [module_UI_data_sidebar](main/module_data_sidebar.qmd#module-UI-data-sidebar)("data_sidebar") ```markdown ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} sidebarPanel(width = 3, module_UI_data_sidebar("data_sidebar") ) ``` ::: # Dynamic Borrowing Shiny Application require(bslib) require(dplyr) require(purrr) require(DT) require(readxl) require(plotly) library(shiny) require(psborrow) require(shinyFeedback) library(shinyjs) library(RBesT) library(shinybusy) library(ggpubr) library(bayesplot) # Get all R script files in the functions directory and its subdirectories files <- list.files("functions", pattern = "\\.R$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE) walk(files, source) options(shiny.maxRequestSize = 50 * 1024^2) ui <- navbarPage( useShinyjs(), # Initialize shinyjs header = tags$head(tags$style(HTML(".navbar-default .navbar-nav > li > a:hover {color: black;background-color: #f7bfc2; text-decoration:underline;} body {font-size: 15px;} /* 全局字体大小 */ .navbar-brand, .navbar-nav > li > a {font-size: 18px;} .tab-content {font-size: 16px;} .custom-label {font-size: 15px; font-weight: bold;} button, .btn { background-color: #FD8B01 !important; border: none !important; } ")), withMathJax()), theme = bs_theme(bootswatch = "minty", primary = "#be2bbb", 'navbar-inverse-bg' = "#f7bfc2", 'navbar-bg' = "#f1d4f1", "progress-bar-bg" = "#be2bbb"), title = "Dynamic Borrowing", ### Data Section #### tabPanel(title = "Data", fluidPage( sidebarLayout( ### Data - Side Bar sidebarPanel(width = 3, [module_UI_data_sidebar](main/module_data_sidebar.qmd#module-UI-data-sidebar)("data_sidebar") ), ### Data - Main Panel mainPanel(type = "tabs", width = 9, tabsetPanel( #### Data Input #### tabPanel(title = "Data Input", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom", # Simulate Datasets module_UI_simulate_data("simu_data"), # Upload Datasets module_UI_upload_data("upload_data") ) #### Data Visulization #### # tabPanel(title = "Data Visulization", # class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom", # module_UI_generate_data("generate_data") # ), # # #### Advanced Settings #### # tabPanel(title = "Advanced Settings", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom") ) ), position = c("left", "right") ) ) ), # Simulation #### tabPanel(title = "Simulation", fluidPage( sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, module_UI_simu_sidebar("simu_sidebar") ), mainPanel(type = "tabs", width = 9, tabsetPanel( tabPanel( title = "Simulation Using One Method", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom", module_UI_simu_one_method("simu_one_method") ) # tabPanel( # title = "Comparison Across Multiple Methods", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom" # ) ) ) ) ) ), # Instruction #### tabPanel("Instruction", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom", tabsetPanel( tabPanel("Data Panel", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom", div(tags$iframe(style = "height:100vh; width:100%; border:none; overflow:hidden;", src = "instruction/data/_site/introduction.html")) ), tabPanel("Simulation Panel", class = "p-3 border rounded border-top-0 rounded-bottom", div(tags$iframe(style = "height:100vh; width:100%; border:none; overflow:hidden;", src = "instruction/simulation/_site/introduction.html")) ) ) ), # Section #### section_UI_guidance("guidance") ) ```
